dashboard.title: Your Servers
dashboard.empty: No servers yet. Create your first server to get started.
dashboard.deleteConfirm: Delete this server permanently? All worlds and files will be removed.
dashboard.installFailedHint: Installation failed. Check your connection and retry.

create.title: Create a new server
create.name: Server name
create.spigotWarning: Spigot is built from source with BuildTools. This can take 10+ minutes.
create.proxyHint: Velocity is a proxy that links multiple servers together.

console.placeholder: Type a command and press Enter...
console.notRunning: Server is not running. Press Start to launch it.
console.installing: Installing server... progress is shown below.

content.vanillaUnsupported: Vanilla servers do not support mods or plugins.
content.restartHint: Restart the server to apply content changes.

files.notText: This file cannot be opened as text.

players.needRunning: The server must be running to manage players.
players.onlineTip: Players currently connected. Kick or ban them directly from here.
players.whitelistTip: When enabled, only whitelisted names can join.
players.opsTip: Operators (OP) have full command permissions on the server.
players.bannedTip: Banned players cannot join until pardoned.

settings.generalTip: Core server settings: name, RAM, port, and auto-restart.
settings.worldTip: Gameplay and world settings from server.properties.
settings.securityTip: Control who can join and Mojang account verification.
settings.name: Server name
settings.ramTip: How much RAM Java allocates to the server. Don't use all system RAM.
settings.autoRestartTip: Automatically restarts the server if it crashes.
settings.jvmArgsTip: Extra Java flags. Leave empty unless you know what you're doing.
settings.worldBorderHint: Applied live via console. Server must be running.
settings.motdTip: Text shown in the server list.
settings.maxPlayersTip: Maximum players allowed online at once.
settings.viewDistanceTip: How many chunks each player sees. Higher = more load.
settings.onlineModeWarn: Disabling online mode lets anyone join with any username, including TLauncher and offline clients. This removes Mojang account verification and is less secure. Continue?

network.title: Network & Access
network.addressesTip: Use public IP for players outside your network, local IP for LAN.
network.publicIpTip: Your internet-facing address. Needed for remote players.
network.localIpTip: Your address on the local network (LAN).
network.firewallTip: Opens port {{port}} on the OS firewall ({{os}}). Also clears server-ip so the server listens on all interfaces.
network.providerFirewallTip: If your VPS has a provider firewall (AWS, Hetzner...), open the port there too.

backups.title: Backups
backups.autoNote: The app runs backups automatically in the background on the selected schedule.

perf.optimizeDesc: One click applies the best known performance settings for your server's RAM: tuned Java (Aikar) flags, view & simulation distances, network compression, and tick settings.
perf.optimizeTip: Applies JVM, server.properties, and YAML tuning based on server type and RAM.

will.jvm: Tuned JVM flags (Aikar) that prevent GC freezes and reduce lag
will.properties: View & simulation distance, network compression, faster chunk saving
will.yaml: spigot.yml, bukkit.yml and Paper tuning (mobs, redstone, hoppers, explosions)

applied.purpur: Purpur config (alternate keepalive protects high-ping players from being kicked)

perf.needsRestart: Restart the server to activate the optimizations.
perf.vanillaHint: Vanilla servers only support the Java and basic settings tweaks. For much better performance, create a Paper server — same game, much faster.
perf.pregenDesc: Generating chunks during play is the biggest source of lag. This tool pregenerates the whole map with Chunky, so exploring stays smooth even on low RAM.
perf.pregenTip: Pre-generates chunks around the map center. Larger radius = longer runtime.
perf.pregenUnsupported: Pregeneration needs a server that supports plugins or mods (Paper, Purpur, Spigot, Fabric, Forge...).
perf.chunkyRestart: Restart the server to load Chunky, then start pregenerating.
perf.estChunks: ≈ {{n}} chunks will be generated around the map center
perf.setBorder: Set the world border to the same size (stops new chunk generation)
perf.needRunning: Start the server first to begin pregenerating.
perf.pregenDone: Map pregeneration complete! Exploring is now lag-free.
perf.pingNote: For the best ping, port-forward on your router or use a VPS close to your players.
